evidence: I own about 25 kundalini yoga dvds.
I always like to remind readers that I'm a total belly dance beginner.
This is a dvd for every level.
All in all a good, simple yoga program.
Everything is done at a relaxed and easy pace.
I wish this was a 60 minute dvd. The actual workout is only 20 minutes.
I was disappointed with this one, mostly due to production issues and music selections.
I love most of the Raviana dvds.
I was looking at a clip of tripsichore yoga and thought, now that's creative, and I know Shiva Rea is capable of this.
The music is bollywood hip hop.
I just finished doing this dvd and I absolutely loved it!

summary: The user has a strong preference for yoga and dance-related content, particularly enjoying simple and slow-paced workouts. They value high production quality and have a notable loyalty to specific instructors, often emphasizing the emotional and sensory experiences provided by the dvds.
